title: ServerExe2
description: Modpack for ServerExe2 private server. Includes mods for performance optimization, expanded world generation (Terralith, structures), and quality-of-life features (UI, maps, utility). Required to join ServerExe2.
body:
**English Description**

This is the official modpack for the ServerExe2 private server. It includes a selection of mods focused on:

* **Performance Enhancement:** For smoother gameplay.
* **World Generation Expansion:** Adds new biomes and structures.
* **Quality of Life Features:** Useful interface and daily gameplay modifications.
* **Server Integration:** Includes mods like voice chat.

The modpack is necessary for a complete game experience on ServerExe2. Installable via compatible Modrinth launchers.
